description: TAM pgd_delta sweep: pgd_delta=1.0, pgd_step_size≈0.333 (delta/mining_opt_steps). All else fixed: anchor_step=2, mining_opt_steps=3, gc_loss. Intermediate PGD radius. Compare to q220 (pgd_delta=1.5). SUCCESS: val_mse < 0.00975 and anchor_dist in (0.2, 5.0).
